rationale: Satisfies the issue's ACs (Option B leaves run_id NULL for all historical rows, deriving nothing); matches the query-level-join architecture already committed to in ENH-2712/ENH-2721 and scored 10/12 there; degrades safely to NULL under ll-parallel concurrent-run ambiguity.
rule: Option A - timestamp-window join with ambiguity guard (stamp run_id only when exactly one loop_runs row matches usage_events.ts window; else NULL)
alternatives_rejected: Option B (query-time join only, no persisted run_id) - re-proposes an alternative already evaluated and rejected in ENH-2712/ENH-2721 for the same loop_runs-lacks-session_id ambiguity; fails AC #1/#3 outright.
